hero.title: Come home to a clean apartment
hero.subtitle: Regular, deep, and move-out cleaning for homes and offices. Vetted staff, our own professional supplies, and a simple promise: if a spot isn't right, we come back free.
hero.imageAlt: Cleaner polishing a bright kitchen counter

services.title: What we clean
services.subtitle: Homes, offices, and everything you'd rather not scrub yourself.

items.title: Regular home cleaning
items.description: Weekly or bi-weekly visits by the same person each time — floors, bathrooms, kitchen, dusting, and the details you stop noticing.

items.title: Deep cleaning
items.description: The spring-clean treatment: inside cabinets, behind appliances, limescale, grout, and window frames. Plan on us being there most of the day.

items.title: Move-in / move-out
items.description: Empty-apartment cleaning that gets deposits back and makes new homes feel like yours, not the previous tenant's.

items.title: Office cleaning
items.description: After-hours cleaning for offices and clinics, on a schedule that never interrupts your work.

items.title: Windows & glass
items.description: Both sides, frames included, streak-free — also as a standalone service for that one dreaded chore.

items.title: After renovation
items.description: Construction dust is its own science. We bring industrial vacuums and patience.

about.title: About Blistavo
about.subtitle: A local team, not an anonymous platform.
about.body: Blistavo started in 2017 when Ivana couldn't find a cleaning service she'd trust with her own keys. Today we're a team of twelve — every member interviewed in person, background-checked, trained for two weeks, and paid properly, which is why they stay. You get the same cleaner each visit, who learns how you like things done. Keys are stored coded and insured, and in eight years we've never had a claim.

features.title: Why clients trust us
features.subtitle: The details that make a cleaning service worth keeping.

items.title: Same cleaner every time
items.description: They learn your home; you learn their name.

items.title: Supplies included
items.description: Professional, kid- and pet-safe products — or yours, if you prefer.

items.title: Insured and bonded
items.description: Full liability coverage for your peace of mind and ours.

items.title: Re-clean guarantee
items.description: Something not right? Tell us within 24h and we fix it free.

items.title: Easy scheduling
items.description: Book, move, or skip a visit with one message.

items.title: Fair, fixed prices
items.description: Quoted by apartment size, not by the hour that mysteriously stretches.

items.name: Tanja M.
items.text: Ista osoba, isti dan, isti standard — three years running. Giving them keys was hard the first week and never crossed my mind again.

items.name: Marko J.
items.text: My landlord walked in, looked around, and returned the full deposit without a word. Best money I spent on that move.

items.name: Ordinacija Vita
items.text: They clean our clinic every evening after close. In two years, not one morning surprise. That reliability is everything for us.

pricing.title: Simple prices
pricing.subtitle: Fixed by apartment size, supplies included. Offices quoted individually.

plans.name: One-time cleaning
plans.description: Standard cleaning of an apartment up to 60 m².

plans.name: Regular cleaning
plans.description: Weekly or bi-weekly, with your dedicated cleaner.

items.question: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
items.answer: Up to you. Most regular clients give us a key — stored coded, insured, never labelled with an address. For first visits many people prefer to be home, and that's completely fine.

items.question: Who exactly comes to my home?
items.answer: A background-checked, trained member of our team — the same person every visit for regular clients. You'll know their name before the first appointment, and you can request a change anytime, no questions asked.

items.question: What if something gets damaged?
items.answer: We're fully insured. Report it within 24 hours, we document it and the insurance covers it. In eight years it has happened twice — both times a vase, both times resolved within a week.

items.question: Are your products safe for kids and pets?
items.answer: Yes — our standard line is certified non-toxic. If anyone in your home has allergies or you prefer your own products, just tell us and we'll use those.

items.question: How does the guarantee work?
items.answer: If any area doesn't meet the standard, message us within 24 hours with a photo and we return to re-clean it free — usually the same or next day.

cta.title: Ready for a spotless home?
